name: FIRST COMMUNITY BANKSHARES INC /VA/
summary: First Community Bankshares, Inc. is a Virginia-based financial holding company founded in 1989, operating through its wholly owned subsidiary First Community Bank (chartered 1874). It provides banking products and services to individual and commercial customers, including deposits, loans, and wealth management/investment advisory services through its Trust Division and First Community Wealth Management subsidiary, across 52 branch locations in Virginia, West Virginia, North Carolina, and Tennessee.
